name: verbal-judo
description: George Thompson's Verbal Judo: The Gentle Art of Persuasion — a conflict communication toolkit using words to disarm conflict, deflect criticism, and generate voluntary compliance without force or aggression, based on techniques from a former police officer.
useCase: Master the art of verbal conflict resolution — use LEAPS, the 5 universal truths, and redirection techniques to de-escalate conflicts and communicate effectively.
knownRisks: The police context may not directly translate to all civilian situations
Techniques require practice — reading the book alone is not enough
In genuine power imbalances, verbal skills alone may not be sufficient
